c.d: The maximum number of recipients or messages the app can send in a given period, important for broadcasting efficiently to large audiences.
Ability to send SMS messages and share multimedia content like photos, videos, and GIFs to recipients.
The ease of creating, managing, and organizing contact groups and distribution lists for message broadcasting.
Support for integration with other productivity or communication tools and platforms to enhance functionality.
Availability of real-time analytics and reporting features to monitor messaging campaigns and engagement metrics.
End-to-end encryption or other security features ensuring message privacy and data protection.

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: The user friendliness of the app's interface for composing, sending, and managing broadcast messages.
